title: CuspAI raises $450 million Series B for AI materials discovery
excerpt: The U.K. startup, now valued at $2.6 billion, is directing 80% of its near-term research toward semiconductor materials
content_html:
Cris Tolomia

Mon, July 20, 2026 at 8:19 AM EDT 2 min read

CuspAI, a Cambridge, U.K.-based artificial intelligence startup focused on materials discovery, raised $450 million in Series B financing on Monday and launched a coalition of technology and industrial partners it calls the AI Materials Foundry. The round values the company at $2.6 billion, up from $520 million last September, according to Bloomberg.

Venture firms Kleiner Perkins and NEA led the round, with participation from Jeff Bezos's Bezos Expeditions, Glade Brook Capital Partners, Lux Capital, AMD Ventures, Britain's Sovereign AI Venture Fund, and others, the company said. Existing investors including Temasek and Prosus also participated.

The AI Materials Foundry brings together more than 45 organizations — including Nvidia, Meta, Samsung, Hyundai Motor Group, and Lam Research — to pool computing resources, laboratory access, and scientific expertise on CuspAI's platform, the company said. Chad Edwards, CuspAI's co-founder and chief executive officer, said much of the new funding will support lab operations in Cambridge, Singapore, and the San Francisco Bay Area, according to Bloomberg.

CuspAI's platform applies AI to model how new materials would perform, filtering an otherwise vast search space down to the most promising candidates before any physical testing takes place, according to CNBC. Edwards said that semiconductors will absorb 80% of the company's research bandwidth this year, including work aimed at removing or replacing supply-constrained rare metals — among them ruthenium and iridium — from chipmaking workflows.

Josh Coyne, partner at Kleiner Perkins, said in a statement: "Most big leaps in technology come down to a material, and the next set, from cheaper carbon capture to semiconductors and cleaner water, is stuck waiting on materials nobody has discovered yet. CuspAI built a search engine that changes that."

The company was founded by Chad Edwards alongside Max Welling, a prominent Amsterdam-based machine learning researcher. Yann LeCun and Geoffrey Hinton, whose work laid much of the groundwork for modern AI, serve on CuspAI's advisory board. Also on Monday, CuspAI added Abhi Talwalkar — who serves on AMD's board and chairs Lam Research — to that same advisory body, and announced that John Giannandrea, who held senior roles at both Apple and Google, has joined part-time to help stand up the company's California presence.

The Series B follows a $100 million-plus Series A raised less than a year ago, also led by NEA and Temasek, the company said. CuspAI is opening a new office in Singapore and expanding teams in the U.K., the Netherlands, Germany, Japan, and the U.S.

For all its high-profile backing and industry alliances, CuspAI has not yet advanced any project to the point where a candidate material is ready for commercial development; the company's main competitors find themselves in the same position.

content_html_zh:
克里斯·托洛米亚

2026 年 7 月 20 日星期一，美国东部时间上午 8:19 阅读 2 分钟

CuspAI 是一家总部位于英国剑桥的人工智能初创公司，专注于材料发现，周一在 B 轮融资中筹集了 4.5 亿美元，并成立了一个技术和工业合作伙伴联盟，称为 AI Materials Foundry。 据彭博社报道，该轮融资对公司的估值为 26 亿美元，高于去年 9 月的 5.2 亿美元。

该公司表示，风险投资公司 KPCB 和 NEA 领投，杰夫·贝索斯的 Bezos Expeditions、Glade Brook Capital Partners、Lux Capital、AMD Ventures、英国 Sovereign AI Venture Fund 等参投。 包括淡马锡和 Prosus 在内的现有投资者也参与其中。

该公司表示，AI Materials Foundry 汇集了超过 45 个组织——包括 Nvidia、Meta、三星、现代汽车集团和 Lam Research——在 CuspAI 平台上汇集计算资源、实验室访问和科学专业知识。 据彭博社报道，CuspAI 联合创始人兼首席执行官查德·爱德华兹 (Chad Edwards) 表示，大部分新资金将支持剑桥、新加坡和旧金山湾区的实验室运营。

据 CNBC 报道，CuspAI 的平台应用人工智能来模拟新材料的性能，在进行任何物理测试之前，将巨大的搜索空间过滤到最有前途的候选材料。 爱德华兹表示，半导体今年将吸收该公司 80% 的研究带宽，包括旨在从芯片制造工作流程中去除或替换供应受限的稀有金属（其中包括钌和铱）的工作。

凯鹏华盈合伙人乔什·科因(Josh Coyne)在一份声明中表示：“技术上的大多数重大飞跃都归结于材料，而下一个飞跃，从更便宜的碳捕获到半导体和更清洁的水，都在等待尚未发现的材料。 CuspAI 构建了一个改变这一现状的搜索引擎。”

该公司由查德·爱德华兹 (Chad Edwards) 与阿姆斯特丹著名机器学习研究员马克斯·韦林 (Max Welling) 共同创立。 Yann LeCun 和 Geoffrey Hinton 是 CuspAI 顾问委员会的成员，他们的工作为现代人工智能奠定了很大的基础。 同样在周一，CuspAI 将 AMD 董事会成员兼 Lam Research 主席 Abhi Talwalkar 纳入同一咨询机构，并宣布曾在苹果和谷歌担任高级职务的 John Giannandrea 已兼职加入，以帮助巩固该公司在加州的影响力。

该公司表示，B 轮融资是在不到一年前筹集的超过 1 亿美元的 A 轮融资之后进行的，该轮融资也由 NEA 和淡马锡牵头。 CuspAI 将在新加坡开设新办事处，并在英国、荷兰、德国、日本和美国扩大团队。

尽管拥有高调的支持和行业联盟，CuspAI 尚未将任何项目推进到候选材料已准备好进行商业开发的程度；该公司的主要竞争对手发现自己处于同样的境地。
